debug_info.goal:
inst✝ : Pop.ArchReq
arr : Pop.RequestArray inst✝
req : Pop.Request inst✝
⊢ Pop.valConsistent✝ inst✝ (Pop.RequestArray._insert✝ inst✝ arr req) = true

failed_attempts:
unfold RequestArray._insert
  simp only [valConsistent, Array.size_append, Array.size_replicate, Nat.add_sub_cancel]
  induction req.id with
  | zero => simp [Array.getElem, Array.uset, Option.map]
  | succ n ih =>
    simp_all [Array.getElem, Array.uset, Option.map, Nat.succ_eq_add_one]

unfold RequestArray._insert
  simp only [valConsistent, Array.size_append, Array.size_replicate, Nat.add_sub_cancel]
  induction req.id with
  | zero => simp [Array.getElem, Option.map, Nat.zero_eq]
  | succ n ih =>
    simp_all [Array.getElem, Option.map, Nat.succ_eq_add_one]

  | succ n ih =>
